En: Mixing? Does my blood *need* mixing? Or is it good as it is?
Zh: 混合？我的血液需要*混合*吗？或者本来的不好吗？

En: Oops, I didn't mean to wear a nationalist jacket. [Discard the thought -- and the jacket.]
Zh: 哎呀，我不是故意穿上这件民族主义夹克的。[抛弃这个想法——还有这件夹克。]

En: Yes. Let's hope no one saw you wearing that outrageously fascist jacket.
Zh: 是的。希望没人看见你穿着这件凶残的法西斯主义夹克。

En: Wow... this jacket makes you feel *strong*. As if your blood is mixing with that of the venerable Filippian loyalists of old.
Zh: 哇哦……这件夹克让你感觉变得*强壮无比*。就好像你的血液跟古老的菲利普保皇派混合在了一起。

En: It's time to clean up the streets and restore the city to its former glory! Whether you like it or not, this jacket gives you serious nationalist cred.
Zh: 是时候清理这些街区，让这座城市回复昔日的荣光！不论你喜不喜欢，穿着这件夹克给你带来了相当的民族主义信誉。

En: Apologies, you're right! The need for a strong central government has always been clear to you. You're a true patriot of Revachol -- born to do it.
Zh: 很抱歉，你是对的！一直以来你都很清楚，这里需要一个强有力的中央政府。你是个真正的瑞瓦肖爱国者——为此而生。

En: More ammo on our belt for the remainder of the investigation. Good find, detective.
Zh: “看来在接下来的调查中，我们需要准备更多弹药了。很不错的发现，警探。”

En: These are the same belts as the one the victim was hanged with.
Zh: 这些皮带跟之前吊着被害人的一样。

En: Look, lieutenant. The same belts as the one the victim was hanged with. Says *Vermillion* on the side...
Zh: “看，警督。这些皮带跟之前吊着被害人的一样。边上好像写着*弗米利恩*……”

En: The same exact belts. Even the same writing...
Zh: 一模一样的皮带。连上面的字迹都一样……

En: [Finish thought.]
Zh: [完成思维。]

En: You're right. The lieutenant looks at the pile. "This certainly confirms the theory that the belt must've come from inside the harbour."
Zh: “你说的没错。”警督看着那堆东西。“这样就坐实了之前的推论：皮带肯定是从港口里面来的。”

En: You're right. This is probably where Titus and his men got the belt. The lieutenant looks at the pile.
Zh: “你说的没错。这里可能就是提图斯和他的人弄到皮带的地方。”警督看着眼前堆起的东西。

En: Yes, this confirms Titus's story.
Zh: 是啊，这样就证实了提图斯的故事。

En: I knew it was a cargo lashing belt!
Zh: 我就知道是货物的捆扎带！

En: Indeed, it appears so. This is where the belt came from.
Zh: 的确，看起来确实如此。皮带就是从这里来的。

En: All those empty wine bottles and cigarette butts on the ground... Someone *partied* really, really hard here.
Zh: 地上堆满了空酒瓶和烟头……看来有人在这里疯狂*狂欢*了一场。

En: Let's just move on. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 我们走吧。[完成思维。]

En: Snow is quietly covering the numerous wine bottles and cigarette butts on the ground. Someone *partied* really, really hard here.
Zh: 雪花静静飘落，掩埋了一地的空酒瓶和烟头。看来有人在这里疯狂*狂欢*了一场。

En: It's probably nothing. [Discard thought.]
Zh: 也许没什么事。[放弃思维。]

En: Numerous empty wine bottles glisten in the rain. Someone *partied* really, really hard here.
Zh: 一大堆空酒瓶在雨中闪闪发亮。看来有人在这里疯狂*狂欢*了一场。

En: Did I do this?\n
Zh: 是我做的吗？

En: Did I do this?
Zh: “是我做的吗？”

En: Wait, how hard?
Zh: 等等，有多疯狂？

En: Well, they went through six bottles of *Potent Pilsner*, three bottles of *Commodore Red*, and almost four packs of cigarettes -- it must have been pretty hard.
Zh: 这个嘛，他们喝空了6瓶*高度比尔森啤酒*，3瓶*海军准将红朗姆*，还有差不多四包烟——肯定是有够疯狂的。

En: Well... The lieutenant looks at you, then the bottles. "Yes. I think we can say with relative confidence that it was you."
Zh: “呃……”警督看着你，然后看了看瓶子。“是的。我想可以相对有把握的说，是你做的。”

En: Look at it. Of course it was you. You *partied* here.
Zh: 你看看这里。当然是你啊。在这里*狂欢*的就是你。

En: Yeah we did, *bratan*! And from the looks of it we had hell of a time. Hell of a time, *bratan*.
Zh: 是啊，就是我们，*兄弟*！这么看起来，我们一定玩得很开心。非常开心，*兄弟*。

En: This is really sad. I must have been miserable.
Zh: 这也太悲伤了吧。我肯定很痛苦。

En: This is really sad. I must have been miserable.
Zh: “真是太悲哀了。我一定很痛苦。”

En: Looks like I had a lot of fun.
Zh: 看起来我玩得很开心。

En: Looks like I had a lot of fun.
Zh: “看来我玩的很开心。”

En: I'm still not completely convinced it was me.\n
Zh: 我还没有完全确信是我干的。

En: I'm still not completely convinced it was me.
Zh: “我还没有完全相信是我做的。”

En: Yes, the lieutenant agrees. "This scene isn't exactly ripping with joy. Let's just move on." He turns to leave.
Zh: “是啊，”警督表示同意。“这个场面确实算不上开心。我们还是走吧。”他转身离开。

En: It really *really* doesn't. The lieutenant turns to go. "Let's turn our attention elsewhere and move on."
Zh: “*真没有*什么开心的。”警督转身要走。“我们还是把精力放到别的地方吧。”

En: Move away from this scene and you don't have to think about it anymore. Just walk away and it's *gone*!
Zh: 离开这里之后，你就不用再想起它了。只要走开，一切都会*过去*！

En: I am. But it doesn't matter right now. Let's just move on.
Zh: “我相信。但是现在不重要。我们还是走吧。”

En: Well, I am. Who else could crush such quantities, *bratan*? This is wild. You are wild. We should do this again. But right now you should keep moving.
Zh: “是我。这种量还有谁可以做到，*兄弟*。这真是太疯狂了。你也很疯狂。我们什么时候应该再来一次。不过现在，你该走了。”

En: Yeah... a *lot* of fun. Better not think about it and just move on.
Zh: 是啊……真的*很*开心。最好还是别想了，赶紧走吧。

En: You said it, *bratan*! And this can happen again if we want to. And we want to. Only in a different place. Right now you gotta keep moving.
Zh: 这可是你说的，*兄弟*！如果我们想的话，可以随时再来一次。而且我们也确实想这么做。只是下次要换个别的地方。现在你该走了。

En: Yeah, it doesn't exactly look like someone really enjoyed themselves here. No point in dwelling on it now, better keep moving.
Zh: 是啊，看起来确实不像很开心的样子。没必要老惦记这个，最好还是走吧。

En: No, no, *bratan*, I'm sure it was a blast. When do you and I *not* have fun together? Don't answer that, just take that positive feeling and run along!
Zh: 不不，*兄弟*，肯定很开心的。每次你和我在一起的时候，还有*不开心*过？别理它，只要带着这种积极的感觉，继续前进吧！

En: I must have been on an advanced scouting mission in the harbour.
Zh: 我肯定是在港口执行一项高级侦察任务。

En: I must have been on an advanced scouting mission in the harbour.
Zh: “我肯定是在港口执行一项高级侦察任务。”

En: Yes. That's what this was. A reconnaissance mission. Wish you'd only remember the good intel you brought back...
Zh: 是的，就是这样。一项侦察任务。希望你还记得自己带回来的有用情报……

En: Oh *SO* advanced. Deep in the enemy territory -- getting fucked up right under everyone's nose -- high on life and adrenaline... and alcohol apparently. The tie tightens around your neck. "I'm very proud of you."
Zh: “哦，真的*特别*高级。深入敌人的领地——就在所有人的眼皮子下面搞得乱七八糟——情绪高昂，肾上腺素飙升……显然，还有不少酒精。”领带渐渐勒紧了你的脖子。“我为你感到非常骄傲。”

En: Yes, the lieutenant marks dryly. "This looks pretty advanced alright. For now, let's just move on."
Zh: “没错，”警督冷淡地标记着。“看起来确实很高级。不过现在，我们还是先走吧。”

En: It is harder and harder to reach you... I am not sure how well you'll hear me...
Zh: 要想接触到你，真是越来越困难了……不知道你还能不能听到我的声音……

En: Please, I want to help you! Where must I go next?
Zh: 拜托了，我想帮你！接下来我该去哪里？

En: Can't you just tell me where you are? Or what you are?
Zh: 就不能直接告诉我你在哪吗？或者你是谁？

En: GET OUT OF MY HEAD!
Zh: 从我的脑子里滚出去！

En: Listen within the flower of home… I am lost... Please....
Zh: 在鲜花的家园中聆听……我迷路了……请求你……

En: I am lost and unfound... Listen within the flower of home…
Zh: 我迷失了，失去了方向……在鲜花的家园中聆听……

En: Forgive me... I only want reunion... I am struggling to know where... Listen within the flower of home… Please...
Zh: 原谅我……我只是想与你重聚……我不知道这是哪里……在鲜花的家园中聆听……请求你……
